prompt: Use the image just shown as the visual reference for the source character identity and mood: a tiny cute green Budew-like flower bud in a lush flower garden, mischievous but harmless. Create a clean HD 2D game battle VFX sprite sheet for a Pokemon-style signature attack called itchy pollen. Exact 2x2 grid, four equal cells, read left-to-right top row then left-to-right bottom row. Solid flat #FF00FF magenta background in every cell, no gradients in the background, no borders, no frame lines, no text, no labels, no UI, no watermark. Effect-only animation, no arena and no card frame. Keep all visible elements fully inside each cell with generous magenta margin, same scale and centered composition in every cell. Frame 1: a small cute puff of pink and yellow-green pollen swirls outward with two tiny green leaves, hinting at the Budew flower-bud silhouette without drawing a full character. Frame 2: the pollen cloud grows; several simple item-like silhouettes (a ball, a little wrapped candy shape, a small card rectangle) are caught inside translucent pollen bubbles, looking gently stuck and confused, but no symbols or text. Frame 3: peak impact: a bright round pollen poof with playful spiral motes and sticky sparkles, the trapped item silhouettes wobbling inside the cloud; funny and charming, not scary. Frame 4: fade-out residue: soft drifting pollen motes and sleepy bubbles, only faint item silhouettes remaining. Style: polished 2D game VFX, crisp silhouette, readable at small size, cheerful pastel pink pollen with lime-green highlights and warm yellow sparkle cores, transparent-style clean edges after chroma key, no dirty border, no checkerboard, no black background. The entire subject must fit fully inside each cell; no spark, leaf, bubble, smoke trail, or pollen mote may cross a cell edge; leave magenta margin on all four sides; same visual scale in every frame.
